name: DC_UV_DIAGNOSTIC_B50
purpose: Display one preserved UV stream through a numbered diagnostic texture without changing source mesh data.

inputs.name: UV
inputs.description: One explicitly selected preserved UV attribute.

inputs.name: Grid Image
inputs.unit_or_space: scene-linear interpretation declared by image role
inputs.description: Numbered diagnostic texture used only for mapping inspection.

outputs.name: Diagnostic Color
outputs.description: Unlit diagnostic output suitable for an Emission shader.

ownership: The caller owns UV stream selection.
The group owns display mapping only and must not rewrite UV data.
performance_notes: Expected to be inexpensive, but it has not been built or timed.
limitations: This contract does not identify the original material-facing UV stream.
P1 status means no Blender node tree has been executed.
